data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifies choices to reduce decision time, facilitating a smoother user experience.
data.technical_spec: Streamlined checkout process with minimized steps and options.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Ensures interactive elements are large and easily clickable, enhancing navigability.
data.technical_spec: Responsive design with thumb-friendly touch targets.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Groups related items to improve user understanding and navigation.
data.technical_spec: Organized layouts with relevant product suggestions and groupings.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Incorporates familiar elements to meet user expectations.
data.technical_spec: Consistent interface design and functionality matching common user behaviors.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Limiting the amount of information presented to avoid overwhelming users.
data.technical_spec: Clean interfaces with progressive disclosure of information.
